title: proteopsis lanuginosa
intro: Proteopsis lanuginosa, also known as the woolly proteopsis, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of China and Russia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of proteopsis lanuginosa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to help reduce pain and swelling, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of proteopsis lanuginosa include dried roots and rhizomes, which are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders for medicinal use.
